pr.title: chore(admin): drop dead/inert app_settings columns (audit P8 follow-up)
pr.body:
## Summary

Follow-up to the `app_settings` audit. The audit flagged three columns the admin form let an operator edit but that **no business code ever consumed** — i.e. silent UX traps where setting a value did nothing. This PR removes all three end-to-end (column + Pydantic schema + admin allowlist + seed + admin UI + types).

### What was wrong

| Column | Verdict | Why |
|---|---|---|
| `invoice_commission_percent` | **DEAD** | Zero consumers in `backend/app/services_*.py`, `routers/*.py`, `cryptopay.py`, or the bot. The form persisted edits, the audit log recorded them, no code path read the value. |
| `min_deposit` (singleton) | **INERT** | Wallet deposits enforce `currency.min_deposit` (per-currency override at `services_wallet.create_deposit_invoice:296`). The singleton value was read only by the admin settings router to render the form. |
| `min_withdraw` (singleton) | **INERT** | Same pattern — `services_wallet.create_withdrawal:916` enforces `currency.min_withdraw`. |

The per-currency `Currency.min_deposit` / `Currency.min_withdraw` overrides (the **actual** enforcement points) are untouched. They have always been the real minimum-amount knobs and are still edited via `/admin/taxonomy` → «Валюты».

### Changes

- **alembic** `d1b6e2g04c38_drop_dead_app_settings_columns.py` — `op.drop_column` for all three on `app_settings`. Tested `upgrade → downgrade → upgrade` round-trip locally against the compose Postgres image; downgrade restores column shape with the original server defaults (`invoice_commission_percent=0.0`, `min_deposit=1`, `min_withdraw=1`).
- **`backend/app/models.py`** — removed the three `mapped_column` declarations.
- **`backend/app/schemas.py`** — removed from `AdminSettingsOut`, `AdminSettingsUpdateIn`, and the validator allowlists (the now-empty `_min_ok` validator block also removed).
- **`backend/app/routers/admin/settings.py`** — removed from `_EDITABLE_FIELDS` and `_to_out`.
- **`backend/app/seed.py`** — the singleton insert now only seeds `deal_commission_percent=5.0` (the only remaining money column).
- **Frontend** — removed the three `NumberField` rows from `AdminSettingsPage.tsx` (one from «Комиссии (%)», two from «Лимиты и тайминги»); updated `AdminSettingsDto` / `AdminSettingsUpdateBody`; regenerated `openapi.json` + `openapi.generated.ts`.
- **Tests** — dropped the now-orphaned `AppSettings.min_deposit/min_withdraw` precision-widening test from `test_h2_money_precision_widening.py`; the matching `Currency.min_deposit/min_withdraw` round-trip test is untouched. Updated `AdminSettingsPage.test.tsx`'s `makeSettings()` fixture.
- **`backend/app/money.py`** docstring updated to note that the two AppSettings columns no longer exist (Currency columns still at `Numeric(28, 8)`).

### Test results (local)

- `python3 -m pytest -x -q --no-cov` → **779 passed in 179.39s**.
- `npm run typecheck` → clean.
- `npm run lint` → clean.
- `npm run test:run` → **504 passed (60 files)**.
- `ruff check` + `ruff format --check` → clean.
- `pyright backend/app` → 0 errors, 27 pre-existing warnings.
- Alembic `upgrade head → downgrade c0a5e1f93b27 → upgrade head` → clean.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] **Schema safety:** the migration `op.drop_column`s three real columns on a singleton table. Per-row values are lost on downgrade (re-added with their original `server_default`), but they never drove behaviour so there is nothing functional to recover. If you maintain a sidecar/data warehouse that ingests `app_settings`, drop these columns there too or pin the historical values before rolling out.
- [ ] **Frontend visual check:** the admin settings page (`/admin/settings`) now shows two rows in «Комиссии (%)» (Обычная + VIP) and one row in «Лимиты и тайминги» (Авто-истечение pending payment) plus the existing cancellation + max-services rows. Three rows are gone.
- [ ] **Per-currency form unaffected:** confirm `/admin/taxonomy` → «Валюты» → edit currency still shows `min_deposit` / `min_withdraw` and these still gate deposits/withdrawals (they always did — but worth a sanity poke).

### Notes

This is the first of the three follow-up PRs the audit proposed. The other two (`fix/admin-settings-min-amounts-inert` — Option A wire-in vs Option B relabel — and `chore/admin-settings-help-text`) are subsumed by this one: dropping the columns outright is the cleanest fix because nothing was reading them anyway. No "informational display" mode needed.


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/18a86fe3f3364c29a771ba31944c295d
Requested by: @g2void2-byte
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
